Interface ISeamlineTaskInfo4

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control information defining a seamline task.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("71892F30-A451-4078-9916-0E29679C7A52")]
public interface ISeamlineTaskInfo4 : ISeamlineTaskInfo3, ISeamlineTaskInfo2, ISeamlineTaskInfo

Properties

BaseSeamline 

IGeometry BaseSeamline { get; set; }

Property Value

IGeometry

CellSize 

IPoint CellSize { get; set; }

Property Value

IPoint

DifferenceRaster 

IRaster DifferenceRaster { get; set; }

Property Value

IRaster

EndPoint 

IPoint EndPoint { get; set; }

Property Value

IPoint

InitialPath

The initial path which is to be modified to create the final seamline.

IGeometry InitialPath { get; set; }

Property Value

IGeometry
